title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.1, Phi 3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer; use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding connectors for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models (now renamed Open WebUI).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich interactive CLI wrapper with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, pull, and manage models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal Next.js chatbot UI wired to Ollama via the JS client; easy Vercel deploy.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Official Nix package for Ollama; reproducible builds and declarative service configs.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers for CI pipelines to test LLM features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama; supports chat, completions, and embeddings in C#.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that forwards channel messages to Ollama and posts replies.
